findings.title: Excel unit mixing error
findings.description: Revenue computed in Rs but labeled as Lakhs. Inflates all P&L, cashflow, DSCR by 100,000x. DSCR shows 7,933x instead of ~2x.
findings.action: MUST FIX - Divide revenue/cost cells by 100000 OR change label to Rs

findings.title: Three conflicting revenue datasets
findings.description: MASTER_DATA.py formula, MASTER_DATA.py stated values, and Excel models all produce different revenue numbers for same capacity.
findings.affected_files: MASTER_DATA.py + All Excel models + All DOCX reports
findings.action: MUST FIX - Establish single source of truth

findings.title: Investment component gaps
findings.description: 10MT-50MT: Sum of components is 5-13% less than stated investment. Missing line items.
findings.action: MUST FIX - Add missing components (electrical, misc)

findings.title: DSCR completely wrong in Excel
findings.description: Shows 7,933x (impossible). Bank minimum is 1.5x. Any CA would reject immediately.

findings.title: Biomass cost conflict
findings.description: Rs 2,000/MT in assumptions vs Rs 8,000/MT in production cost.

findings.title: Location inconsistency
findings.description: MASTER_DATA says Pune for 5MT, Excel says Lakhimpur Kheri UP.

findings.title: Depreciation method conflict
findings.description: MASTER_DATA uses WDV 15%, Excel uses SLM 10%.
findings.action: Choose one method and apply consistently
